title: Luminous: Butterflies
description: Illuminate your Minecraft World with 23 different butterflies!
body:
![Luminous:Butterflies](https://i.imgur.com/IkQvod5.png)

**LUMINOUS:BUTTERFLIES** is a mod that adds 23 biome dependant butterflies! Catch them with a new item, the **BUTTERFLY NET**, and keep track of your collection with the **BUTTERFLY ENCYCLOPEDIA**, Obtained from journeyman librarian villagers and wandering traders!

![LUMINOUS:BUTTERFLIES is a mod that adds 23 biome dependant butterflies! Catch them with a new item, the BUTTERFLY NET, and keep track of your collection with the BUTTERFLY ENCYCLOPEDIA, Obtained from journeyman librarian villagers and wandering traders!](https://i.imgur.com/XyVamFT.png)

LUMINOUS: BUTTERFLIES Is a variation of my original Minecraft mod: [LUMINOUS](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-luminous-mod)
